subcodes.title: Words to various individuals, spoken on 1912-04-27
subcodes.first_line: It is possible to establish among the powers of the whole world the unity which is found among the states of the United States of America…
subcodes.first_line_orig: چنانکه در میان ایالات متحدهٴ امریکا اتحاد حاصل است ممکن است میان دول عالم باشد
subcodes.subjects: @universal peace; world unity, @religion as reality; definitions of religion, @harmony of science and religion, @unity of governments; political unity
